prompt:
Compare a topic document to its reconstruction from extracted facts.
Identify specific extraction problems against the Five Tests.

TOPIC DOCUMENT (source of truth):
━━━
### Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

Jewellery must not dangle; no hoop earrings or large necklaces (health and safety). On PE days, students must be able to remove stud earrings or other items as required.

### Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

Subtle make-up may be worn from Year 7 upwards (e.g., mascara, powder, foundation, nail varnish); no lipstick.

### Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

Acrylic nails may not be longer than two millimetres from the fingertip (health and safety).

### Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

Shorts and skirts must cover the upper thighs (¾ length or longer). Cycling shorts are permitted on PE days but must also cover the upper thighs.

### Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

All clothes must be without holes or rips. All underwear must be covered by outerwear.
━━━

RECONSTRUCTION (concatenated extracted facts):
━━━
## jewellery guideline

Students must not wear jewellery that dangles, including hoop earrings and large necklaces, to ensure health and safety. On physical education (PE) days, students must be able to remove stud earrings or other items if necessary.

## subtle make-up policy

Students from Year 7 upwards may wear subtle make-up, including mascara, powder, foundation, and nail varnish, but are not permitted to wear lipstick.

## acrylic nails restriction

Students are not allowed to have acrylic nails that extend longer than two millimetres from the fingertip to ensure health and safety.

## shorts and skirts requirement

Students must wear shorts and skirts that cover the upper thighs, measuring ¾ length or longer. Cycling shorts are permitted on PE days if they also cover the upper thighs.

## clothing condition standard

Students must wear clothes that are free from holes or rips and ensure all underwear is not visible by covering it with outerwear.

━━━

Find up to 4 specific problems. For each, classify as:
- over-atomized: one logical unit split into too many facts
- under-atomized: multiple distinct topics merged into one fact
- missing-content: any obligation, permission, exception, or numerical value absent from reconstruction
- not-standalone: fails Test 1 — implied "who", "when", or "except what" without stating it explicitly
- not-canonical: fails Test 4 — navigation language, passive construction, redundant preamble
- not-template-ready: fails Test 5 — audience-specific or channel-specific framing baked in
- wrong-tags: topic tags missing or inconsistent with topic_slug
- other: any other quality issue

Quote exact text from the topic document when describing each problem.
If the reconstruction is good, return an empty problems list.
raw_response: {"problems":[],"overall":"The reconstruction accurately extracts and conveys each significant fact from the original document, maintaining clarity and specificity."}

parsed_output.overall: The reconstruction accurately extracts and conveys each significant fact from the original document, maintaining clarity and specificity.
